pattern: The product's sign is zero if any element is zero, otherwise positive or negative based on the parity of the count of negative numbers.
hints: You never need the actual product, only its sign.
A single zero makes the whole product zero.
Count negatives; an even count gives 1 and an odd count gives -1, but return 0 the moment a zero appears.

stress.description: random values including occasional zeros and negatives
